titleStmt.title: SII 9.587: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 587. (A.R. No. 88 of 1912.) ON THE WALL OF THE VERANDAH ROUND THE VIRABHADRA TEMPLE AT LEPAKSHI, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1460, Viḷambi, Śrāvaṇa, ba. 10, Sō[mavāra] corresponding to A.D. 1538 August 19, Monday in the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya. It records that Penugoṇḍe Virapaṇṇayya made a gift of the village Chikkanandichervu, surnamed Dēvarāyapura, which he purchased from certain Brāhmans (named), for the service of the god Vīrabhadra of Lēpākshi. The village is stated to have been granted as a sarvamānya to an ancestor of these Brāhmans by Prauḍha-Dēva-Mahārāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . lēpākṣīpurakūrmaśailanilayaśrīvīrabhadrēśituḥ
naivēdyādisamṛddhayē vilasatā śrīvīrapaṁṇākhyayā
bhūbhartrā cikanaṁdicarvuviditō grāmaḥ svasīmānvitaḥ krītvā
sādhu samarpitō vijayatāmasminṛ śilāśāsanē . svasti śrījayā
bhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1460 neya viḷaṁbisaṁ
vatsarada śrāvaṇa ba 10 sō dallū śrīmanṛmahārājādhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīrapra
tāpa śrīacyutadēvamahārāyaru pṛthvīrājyaṁgaivuttaṁ yiralū lēpākṣivīrē
śvaradēvara nijabhaktarāda lēpākṣi naṁdilakkiśeṭṭi mudamāṁbā varakumāra penu
goṁḍe virapaṁṇayyanavaru kāśyapagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada rukśākheya
sarvakratu sōmanāthadīkṣitara makkaḷu koṁḍudīkṣitariṁda cikanaṁdicervu yeṁ
ba grāmadalli caturthāṁśavanu . Ā gōtrada Ā sūtrada ceṁnidīkṣitara makkaḷu duggaṇadī
kṣitaru namaśivāyadīkṣitaru jana yibbariṁdalū I grāmada caturthāṁśava
nu . Ā gōtrada Ā sūtrada sōmanāthasōmayājigaḷa makkaḷu sōmaṇasōmayājigaḷiṁ
dalū I grāmada caturthāṁśavanū Ā gōtrada Ā sūtrada Aṁjanesōmayājiga
ḷa makkaḷu tiṁmappa Aṁjanaiyya jana yibariṁdalū I grāmada caturthāṁśava
nū koṁḍudīkṣitaru muṁtāda 4 nālku bage Ava
riṁdalū prauḍhadēvamahārāyara kaiyallū I nālku bage Avarigū kūṭasthanāda dēvare
sōmayājigaḷige sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvakavāgi pratigrahalabdhavā
da yēkabhōgavāda catussīmāsamanvitavāda bēlūra cāvaḍige salluva sādalistha
ḷada deppaṟu yeṁba grāmake sa�vopavāda dēvarāyapuraveṁba pratināmavuḷaṁthā ci
kanaṁdicervu yeṁba sarvamā(ṁ)nyagrāmavanū I virapaṁṇayyanavaru tatkālōcita ma
dhyastaparikalpita kraya mūlyadravya ghaṭṭivarahagaḷu 400 Akṣarada
llū nānūru ghaṭṭivarahānū sallisi koṭṭu grā
mada pūrvada tā(ṁ)mraśāsana sahavāgi krayavanū tekkoṁ
ḍu I vīrēśvaradēvarige Amrutapaḍi naivēdya muṁtāda vaibha
vaṁgaḷige sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvakavāgi Ācaṁ
drārkasthāi Āgi dhāreneradu koṭa cikanaṁdicervugrāmada śāsana .
Digital edition of SII 9.587 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
